'''Shear mites''' were a large [[Insect/Legends|insect]] form of life native to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Dathomir/Legends|Dathomir]].

==Biology and appearance==
Shear mites were vicious half-meter insects living on the planet Dathomir,<ref name="GatORW" /> although they could also be found on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]].<ref name="TCSWE">{{CSWECite|III|145|shear mite}}</ref> They lived in the Dathomiri mountains,<ref name="GatORW" /> where they constructed hives.<ref name="SWG" />

The mites secreted a powerful [[Acid/Legends|acid]] that allowed them to consume solid rock. Shear mites usually avoided contacts with other animals and only attacked cornered. Their name originated from the powerful razor-sharp mandibles they possessed,<ref name="GatORW" /> which were used in conjunction with the acid they produced allowed them to chew through any creature hides. Even [[Rancor/Legends|rancors]] could be severely injured by the acid-laced mandibles of the shear mites.<ref name="BoS">''[[Book of Sith: Secrets from the Dark Side]]''</ref>

Their species consisted of hunters, soldiers and queens.<ref name="SWG" /> The [[Gender/Legends|females]] were known to secrete a powerful adhesive that acted in a manner similar to cement and was used to protect the entrances of their [[Egg/Legends|egg]] burrows. This adhesive was considered one of the strongest known substance of its kind in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].<ref name="GatORW" />

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:Shear_mite_concept_art.jpg|thumb|right|200px|Concept art for ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]''.]]
Shear mites appeared in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref>
